privileged_info_summary: The task initializes a Maven project named 'sort-algorithms' at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/sort-algorithms with InsertionSort and SelectionSort implementations from TheAlgorithms/Java under Apache 2.0 license. The agent must initialize Git (defaulting to 'main' branch), create a .gitignore file excluding Maven and IDE artifacts, commit all source files with a message pattern matching 'initial', create and switch to feature branch 'feature/add-merge-sort', implement MergeSort.java in src/main/java/com/sorts/, write a corresponding test file MergeSortTest.java in src/test/java/com/sorts/ with a minimum of 3 @Test methods, and commit these files on the feature branch.
